content.html:
The Square Well,
Continuum Solutions
We saw in eq. (8-69) that asymptotically the free-particle solution has the form
content.markdown: We saw in eq. (8-69) that asymptotically the free-particle solution has the form
content.text: We saw in eq. (8-69) that asymptotically the free-particle solution has the form

content.html: $${\bf j}=\frac{\hbar}{2i\mu}\,(\psi^{**}({\bf r})\nabla\psi({\bf r})-\nabla\psi^{**}({\bf r})\psi({\bf r}))$$
